# @KanikaBK on agent memory loops

## The Idea
*(What is the single biggest claim or insight this post is making?)*

Long-running coding agents need a memory cycle that prunes more aggressively than current chat history limits — most context past 100k tokens is dead weight.

## Why I Saved This
